allow: Bash(python -c "from fileguard.config import load_config; c=load_config\('config.example.yaml'\); print\('watch_dirs:', c['fileguard']['watch_dirs']\); print\('api:', c['fileguard']['api']\); print\('debounce_ms:', c['fileguard']['general']['debounce_ms']\); print\('max_queue_size:', c['fileguard']['general']['max_queue_size']\)")
